title: Mission Operations and Scheduling Software
chapter_title: Ground Data Systems and Mission Operations

data.Type of Product: Open-source command and control system that can be used in all phases of testing and operations
Command and telemetry system that has been available since 2000
Group of mission planning and scheduling products for both aerial and satellite imaging applications
Group of hardware and software components for end-to-end Satellite Operations Center (SOC)
Monitoring and control interface with “lights- out” automation features built-in
Cloud-based command and telemetry system that can interface with some COTS flight software
